blocked_reason: Essbase 21c REST API at https://ess21c.cealinfra.com/essbase/rest/v1/ requires HTTP Basic auth (WWW-Authenticate: Basic realm="Oracle Analytics Cloud - Essbase"). The JET UI redirects to IDCS OAuth at idcs-f5e26b80ce5d4d20a66ba648b5e00403.identity.oraclecloud.com — a DIFFERENT identity provider from the one that issues AIDP_SESSION tokens (authService.oracle.com / aud=oci). So an OCI session token cannot be passed as Bearer to Essbase REST. Need either: (a) Essbase username + password (Ahmed's IAM Domain credentials in the cealinfra IDCS), OR (b) an IDCS OAuth Confidential App registered in idcs-f5e26b80ce5d4d20a66ba648b5e00403 with client_credentials grant.
next_step: Tell me ESSBASE_USER and ESSBASE_PASSWORD (likely the IAM Domain credentials Ahmed uses to login to OCI Console / IDCS).
